name: eBay Field Mapping
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Field Mapping", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab (in the Listing Rules Template) allows you to set different fields in Neto to match certain values on eBay. For example, you may wish to use a different eBay product title or price group to the one used on your Neto website. This allows you to select a custom product field to match the desired item condition to your listing, and is particularly useful if you're selling brand new, used, or refurbished items on the same listing rules template."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Before you begin"}], "data-id": "before-you-begin"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/26-add-and-manage-products#add-product-categories-to-products-via-import", "children": [{"text": "Create custom product fields"}]}, {"text": " in the "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " section called "}, {"text": "eBay Item Condition", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and if you sell used or refurbished items, "}, {"text": "Condition Description", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Familiarise yourself with the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://developer.ebay.com/Devzone/finding/CallRef/Enums/conditionIdList.html", "children": [{"text": " available item conditions, and which categories they apply to"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Enter condition ID's on products"}], "data-id": "enter-condition-id-s-on-products"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Condition ID's need to be entered onto your products so that it can be read by eBay."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open a product and in the left side menu click "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": ". You should see your custom fields called "}, {"text": "eBay Item Condition", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Condition Description", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the ID that corresponds to the condition of your product, and the category you're listing it in. For example, new shoes without a box use the ID 1500, whereas new shoes with a box are 1000. Once done, click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the "}, {"text": "Condition Description", "bold": true}, {"text": " to describe your used or refurbished item."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Repeat these steps for all products you wish to list this way."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Alternatively, you can populate these fields in bulk by using the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/501-product-export-wizard", "children": [{"text": "export wizard"}]}, {"text": " to download csv of the product "}, {"text": "SKU", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "eBay Item Condition", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Condition Description", "bold": true}, {"text": " fields. Add the item conditions and descriptions to the spreadsheet, save, and upload it through the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/668-product-import-wizard", "children": [{"text": "import wizard"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Set up the listing rules templates"}], "data-id": "set-up-the-listing-rules-templates"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " . Map the "}, {"text": "Condition Description", "bold": true}, {"text": " as well if you sell second hand or refurbished items."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBayFieldMapping5.05T5g00000t03NnEAI.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBayFieldMapping5.05T5g00000t03NnEAI.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image8", "width": 700, "height": 236}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save Template & Revise Active Listings", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and repeat for any other rules templates."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your listings on eBay will now have their item condition and description set from the data entered onto your products."}]}]
